v1_description: Enforce RawContextEvent immutability and source provenance at storage
Classify extracted entities into graph layers and eligibility tiers
Make every user input searchable, retrievable, linkable, and provenance-preserving across all index types
Build the Health Knowledge Graph with typed nodes, scored edges, auto-linking, and query API
AI orchestration with structured outputs, baseline/anomaly engine (M10), and evidence ranking (M16)
Capture consent, baseline profile, goals, and initial health context before intelligence starts
Capture symptoms quickly, preserve raw wording, and produce structured symptom episodes
Track active health concerns with triage, evidence, hypotheses, and status changes
Let users inspect connected symptoms, metrics, hypotheses, evidence, body regions, and concerns
First experience layer: health dashboard, symptom log, graph view, concerns view, safety triage
WellBe visual system: orb, flow, motion, and graph cockpit
Full design system: teal palette, light/dark mode, sidebar navigation, component library
Connect wearables, manage sync status, import metrics, configure device placement
Chronological health context with provenance, confidence, and filters
Landing page showing today's health state, active concerns, coaching, and investigation progress
Time-series health metric charts with personal baselines, anomaly highlighting, and correlation views
Capture mood, anxiety, stress, energy, focus, and social energy as longitudinal context
Answer user questions with personal context, evidence, and safe health education
Full user control over account, consent, integrations, data export, and deletion
Low-friction conversational logging, summaries, concerns, and notifications via Telegram
Intent-driven UI shell that composes flows and dashboards based on user need
Health-state driven ambient UI color system reflecting the user's general health signal
Show metrics, vitals, and labs on graph node drill-down
Filter the graph landscape by investigation, concern, or demo case
Expandable timeline rows showing full event payload and metric values
Bounded scroll panel for timeline surfaces
Upload files, scans, photos, and PDFs as source-linked health context with OCR extraction
Guided health investigation flow: intake → evidence → safety checks → clinician handoff
Clinician-ready summaries with timeline, evidence, uncertainty, and source traceability
Temporal patterns, co-occurrence, and compound triggers from indexed context
Time-lagged correlations and temporal order validation across context streams
Identify confounding variables in apparent health relationships
Surface and manage conflicting health signals without hiding them
Surface gaps that would clarify patterns if filled
Ingest local weather and environmental context; correlate with mood and health states
Help users articulate symptoms in free text, clarify wording, and confirm structured episodes
Investigate personal health theories against personal data and external evidence
Design, run, and evaluate safe n=1 experiments to test health hypotheses
Generate multiple evidence-scored paths for any health problem
Turn insight into safe daily action plans, goals, and low-risk experiments
Map physical issues and devices onto anatomical regions while preserving raw descriptions
Detect health signals from paired devices via baseline learning and asymmetry alerts
Help users find doctors by specialty, body system, and location with source-backed ranking
Connect WellBe to hospitals, clinics, labs, and patient portals with consent
Mobile and watch client surfaces for low-friction logging and ambient health signals
Validate provenance, completeness, and processing integrity across all derived facts
